title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at Niva Bupa South Asia Partners - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at Niva Bupa South Asia Partners - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Niva Bupa South Asia Partners invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Risk Analyst at our Bhopal location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Niva Bupa South Asia Partners:
Niva Bupa South Asia Partners is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis
• Proficiency in Forecasting
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in Ind AS
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in Budgeting

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Annual performance appraisal
• Flexible working hours
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Bhopal, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Niva Bupa South Asia Partners!
